recent_excerpts: Rapid7's Global Cybersecurity Summit focuses on AI-driven threats, continuous threat exposure management (CTEM), and closing the gap between visibility and response.
Kyber ransomware deploys two distinct payloads to encrypt both Windows systems and VMware ESXi servers, using a custom tool to wipe ESXi snapshots and hinder recovery.

Rapid7's open-source MCP server and Agent Skill connects its Insight platform to AI assistants like Claude, enabling security teams to query 1.5 million vulnerability records and automate workflows vi
